stages.precondition: box_1 is on top of box_2 and both end-effectors are free.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped by both end-effectors.

pre_validation.reason: The red box (box_1) is stacked on top of the green box (box_2), and both end-effectors appear not to be holding any object.

post_validation.reason: Both end-effectors are positioned on opposite sides of the red box_1, indicating a two-handed grasp.

stages.precondition: box_1 is held by the robot and the table area left of box_2 is free.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is placed on the table to the left of box_2 and both end-effectors are free.

pre_validation.reason: box_1 (red) appears supported on top of box_2 (green) rather than held in the robot grippers, and the table area left of box_2 is not free because the robot arm occupies that space.

stages.precondition: box_1 is on top of box_2 and both robot arms are free.
stages.postcondition: The robot holds box_1 with both arms.

pre_validation.reason: The red box (box_1) is stacked on top of the green box (box_2), and both robot arms appear not to be holding either box.

post_validation.reason: The red box_1 is only contacted by the right arm; the left arm is near the space between the boxes and not holding box_1.

stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible and both end effectors are free.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped symmetrically by the robot's two end effectors.

pre_validation.reason: The green box_1 is unobstructed on the table, and both robot end effectors are not holding any object.

post_validation.reason: The two end effectors are positioned over different boxes: the left end effector is on the green box_1, while the right end effector is on the red box_2, so box_1 is not grasped by both end effectors.

cycles.outcome: cycle_error: Maximum number of replans exceeded (2).

stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped symmetrically by the robot's two end effectors.

post_validation.reason: The two end effectors are positioned over different boxes: the left end effector is on the green box_1, while the right end effector is on the red box_2, so box_1 is not grasped by both end effectors.
